name: marcobellingeri-engine
description: Backend engine del sito: ingest (Valyu) -> embed (voyage-3.5) -> competitor watch (Firecrawl). Human-in-the-loop: la generazione del numero resta gated a un'approvazione umana.

scripts.test:coverage: mkdir -p coverage && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info test/*.test.mjs && sed -i.bak 's|^SF:|SF:engine/|' coverage/lcov.info && rm coverage/lcov.info.bak
